log.summary: Configure tailwind-merge to recognize custom font-size tokens (text-display-*, text-section-title, text-2xs, text-button-md)
log.rationale: cn() used raw twMerge which doesn't know about Tailwind v4 @theme custom text-* tokens (--text-display-sm, etc.). When merging text-display-sm with text-brand-dark, tailwind-merge treated both as unknown text-* classes and dropped the font-size. Fix: use extendTailwindMerge with theme.text array listing all custom text tokens.
log.outcome: Changed twMerge import to extendTailwindMerge with custom text tokens. tsc --noEmit exits 0.

log.outcome: next-intl v4 installed; proxy.ts (Next.js 16 middleware) handles locale detection and routing; all UI strings translated in 3 languages; Product.markets field added for market filtering; 3 demo products have market restrictions; pnpm build, tsc, and lint all pass with zero errors

log.summary: Implement full i18n coverage: UI strings centralized in messages, mocks serve locale-specific content for all pages
log.rationale: User requested all UI strings centralized in i18n files and translated for all 3 locales, and mocks configured to serve locale-specific content (en/es/pt-BR) for home, about, support, and catalog pages
log.outcome: All hardcoded PT-BR strings in components replaced with useTranslations/getTranslations; mocks serve EN/ES/PT-BR variants for hero, FAQ, history, timeline, values, bases, catalog hero, support content; build passes with zero errors

log.summary: Complete i18n audit: localize category names, product data, block content and header nav menu
log.rationale: Double-check audit revealed: category names PT-only in API; PRODUCT_MENU_CATEGORIES in header using hardcoded PT labels/descriptions; product descriptions/badges in PT; block content in PT; spec keys of first product in PT; categories API route not accepting locale
log.outcome: Created catalog-i18n.ts with locale-aware functions for categories, subcategories, products and blocks; header nav menu uses i18n translations; categories API route accepts locale param; useCatalogCategories hook passes locale; all 18 products and 20 blocks translated to EN/ES/PT-BR; build and lint pass

log.summary: Fix i18n Link imports and hardcoded strings found in code review

log.outcome: All locale-aware Link components now auto-prefix the locale; Suspense fallback uses t(loading); root 404 redirects to / instead of /pt-BR

log.summary: Fix i18n violations found in code-review: CATEGORY_IMAGE_BY_ID, aria-labels, Link import, thumbnail alt, default prop

log.outcome: Category images now resolve by cat.id (locale-invariant); all aria-labels use i18n keys; support-documentation uses locale-aware Link; thumbnail alt fully translated; quality-section default prop removed; new keys navAriaLabel, closeSearch, thumbnail added to all 3 message files

log.summary: Mature contracts with discriminated ProductBlock union, FAQItem.id, FeaturedTab, DocumentationCategory, Locale type; set localePrefix as-needed
log.rationale: Contracts were too generic (Record<string,unknown> for block data, string[] for markets/tabs/categories). Backend team needs typed discriminated unions as implementation spec. pt-BR locale prefix removed so default locale URLs are /, /produtos, /sobre without /pt-BR/ prefix.
log.outcome: ProductBlock is now a fully discriminated union per type. FAQItem has stable id field. FeaturedTab and DocumentationCategory are structured types. pt-BR URLs no longer carry /pt-BR/ prefix. tsc --noEmit passes clean.

log.summary: Add Prettier config, .prettierignore, .gitattributes to standardize formatting and eliminate CRLF/LF diffs
log.rationale: Two devs had different Prettier configs (one had none), causing quote/semicolon/indentation diffs in every PR. Added shared .prettierrc (double quotes, semi, trailing commas, printWidth 80, endOfLine lf) and .gitattributes (text=auto eol=lf) to normalize line endings across Windows/macOS. .prettierignore scoped to src/ only to avoid touching docs, .agents/, .claude/ and root config files.
log.outcome: pnpm format now formats only src/ TypeScript/CSS/JSON files consistently. lint-staged runs prettier before eslint on pre-commit. .gitattributes ensures all text files store as LF in the repo.

log.summary: Add ui-component-styling and component-architecture rules (dual-install)

log.outcome: Two new rules now guide agents on: leading scale, gradient unification, section spacing, CVA variants, icon sizes, component folder placement (ui/ vs components/ vs _components/), dummy component principle, composable pattern, file size limits, and !important prohibition
